effect: Backlog stops being chat memory; c-suite and maintenance reports gain usable signal
notes: Chief of Staff: first process priority from CEO vision; no new governance layer.

outcome_review.actual: ideas jsonl now acts as canonical backlog gate with ready/report flows
outcome_review.expected: canonical executable backlog lives in repo, not chat
outcome_review.follow_up: keep new board decisions landing in ideas records, not transcript memory

title: Seed canonical executable backlog

effect: Each promoted idea maps to a durable target with owner Facet and review cadence
notes: Chief of Staff: design before build; target ledger enables backlog prioritization.

outcome_review.actual: targets ledger now exists, ideas validate target ids, and initialize seeds ledger entries
outcome_review.expected: minimal target ledger should give durable ids, owners, and review cadence for priorities
outcome_review.follow_up: next real slice: make cadence/report surface target review timing

title: Design minimal target ledger

effect: Executive review produces idea records with owner, target, state, check, and decision status
notes: Chief of Staff: closes meeting-theater gap.

outcome_review.actual: c-suite outcomes were written back into ideas jsonl and used to drive subsequent execution
outcome_review.expected: board output should persist as executable idea records with owner, target, state, and checks
outcome_review.follow_up: keep persistence lightweight; avoid meeting-only state

title: Make c-suite decisions persist backlog records

effect: Worktrees and issues start only from shaped, testable records
notes: Chief of Staff: keeps process cheap and executable.

outcome_review.actual: ideas ready now enforces stronger readiness and surfaces no ready work when queue is empty
outcome_review.expected: ready queue should contain only executable items with enough metadata to run safely
outcome_review.follow_up: add clean-baseline stop gate only if real drift appears more than once

title: Tighten backlog readiness gate

effect: Weekly hygiene surfaces backlog health without always-on services
notes: Chief of Staff: maintenance owns recurring process hygiene.

outcome_review.actual: ideas report --cost now prints target load, blocked decisions, cost risks, and facet budgets
outcome_review.expected: weekly maintenance packet should surface target, cost, and blocked-decision state
outcome_review.follow_up: keep maintenance workflow on ideas report --cost and expand only after real target-ledger usage

title: Add maintenance priority report

effect: Done work records expected vs actual effect so future c-suite calls improve
notes: Chief of Staff: defer until seeded backlog has one completed item.

outcome_review.actual: ideas review command exists and report surfaces done items still missing review
outcome_review.expected: done work should capture expected versus actual effect for later board calls
outcome_review.follow_up: add due/review cadence only after several real review cycles

title: Add lightweight outcome review loop

effect: Ideas can be filtered by go-live cost, maintenance overhead, check cost, tool sprawl, and reversibility
notes: CFO loop: cheap control layer before queue automation.

outcome_review.actual: cost metadata now feeds report output and c-suite tradeoff discussion
outcome_review.expected: ideas should carry lightweight cost and reversibility metadata for ranking
outcome_review.follow_up: expand fields only when a real decision cannot be made with current set

title: Add minimal cost fields to ideas

effect: agent_check rejects malformed Facet manifests before ownership and routing drift
notes: CTO c-suite loop: schema guardrails before more Facets/process.

outcome_review.actual: typed facet loader now validates nested schema and rejects duplicate command declarations
outcome_review.expected: facet manifests should fail loudly on malformed nested structure and duplicate command ownership
outcome_review.follow_up: keep schema narrow; add fields only with owning checks and docs

title: Tighten Facet manifest schema validation

effect: Tests catch accidental fallback paths in tools before they become implicit contracts
notes: CTO c-suite loop: preserve no-fallback rule while allowing cache/credential exceptions.

outcome_review.actual: contract tests now guard no-fallback behavior in agent_check and repo bootstrap planning
outcome_review.expected: tests should catch accidental fallback paths in internal machinery
outcome_review.follow_up: extend only when new internal truth paths are added

title: Add no-fallback contract tests for internal machinery

effect: ideas report can show cost-heavy, low-reversibility, or tool-sprawl risks from JSONL
notes: CFO loop: report after fields exist; no new scheduler.

outcome_review.actual: ideas report --cost now shows cost risks alongside targets, blocked decisions, and budgets
outcome_review.expected: maintenance packet should show cost-heavy or low-reversibility backlog risk from repo truth
outcome_review.follow_up: watch for noisy fields before adding any scoring automation

title: Add ideas cost report

effect: Budget model captures cron count, closeout checks, command count, generated files, and expected maintenance burden
notes: CFO loop: park enforcement until seeded backlog plus one outcome review exists.

outcome_review.actual: facet budgets now summarize owned paths, checks, commands, docs, and closeout load
outcome_review.expected: facet load should be visible before adding more owner/process surface area
outcome_review.follow_up: keep budgets observational until repeated overload shows up in practice

title: Sketch Facet maintenance budgets

effect: Template value becomes visible immediately after initialize; new Products start with repo-local operating loop instead of blank process
notes: CPO loop 1: strengthens Product/Template value; design after target ledger shape.

outcome_review.actual: initialize now seeds target ledger and starter operating-pack ideas for forks
outcome_review.expected: new products should start with usable operating-loop artifacts instead of blank process
outcome_review.follow_up: next fork-facing proof point is one cheap ready bet visible right after initialize

title: Add Product-fork operating seed pack

effect: c-suite outputs can name accountable process roles without relying on transcript memory
notes: Chief of Staff loop 1: process metadata needed before autonomous handoff.

outcome_review.actual: idea rows now support DACI metadata for board and handoff context

title: Add DACI metadata to idea records

effect: weekly hygiene and c-suite context packet expose unresolved decisions and their owner Facets
notes: Chief of Staff loop 1: blocked decisions need recurring visibility, not new scheduler.

outcome_review.actual: ideas report now counts and lists blocked decisions when present
outcome_review.expected: blocked decisions should appear in recurring hygiene output
outcome_review.follow_up: keep zero-state quiet; only escalate if blocked decisions recur

title: Report blocked decisions in backlog hygiene

effect: agents see conflicting write scopes early and avoid fake parallelism
notes: COO stop-line risk from c-suite: safe items can still collide on write_scope.

outcome_review.actual: ideas ready now prints ready-item conflicts from overlapping write scopes
outcome_review.expected: agents should see write-scope collisions before parallel execution starts
outcome_review.follow_up: pair with active-scope checks only if real collisions still happen

reversibility: remove conflict analysis from ideas ready/report
title: Report write-scope conflicts among ready ideas

effect: agents get one cheap executable batch from repo truth after conflicts are visible
notes: Depends conceptually on conflict reporting; keep one source of truth in ideas command.

outcome_review.actual: ideas ready now recommends a maximal non-overlapping ready batch when ready items exist
outcome_review.expected: repo should suggest one cheap non-overlapping execution batch from ready work
outcome_review.follow_up: keep recommendation heuristic simple until queue size proves otherwise

title: Recommend maximal non-overlapping ready batch

effect: Due and overdue targets become visible in recurring reports so next bets come from repo truth instead of transcript memory
notes: CEO post-review decision: smallest next slice after target ledger and outcome-review batch; add derived due/overdue timing from cadence plus reviews.

outcome_review.actual: ideas report now prints review state, last review, and next due date for every target
outcome_review.expected: target report should expose due and overdue timing from cadence plus reviews
outcome_review.follow_up: use next board pass to decide whether to seed a fork-first ready bet or archive fully-satisfied targets

title: Surface target review timing in reports

effect: Target reports distinguish active work from proved idle targets and flag archive candidates without adding archive commands.
notes: Post-timing board follow-on: cheap lifecycle signal now, archive mechanics later.

outcome_review.actual: ideas report now prints lifecycle plus archive_candidate signal for every target
outcome_review.expected: reports should show which targets are proved idle and candidates for archive without adding new commands
outcome_review.follow_up: delay real archive/reopen mechanics until stale-target pain appears in practice

title: Add target archive candidate signal

effect: Fresh products get one obvious ready bet after initialize, making the operating loop visible on day zero.
notes: Board priority after target timing: prove fork value with one explicit ready bet.

outcome_review.actual: initialize now prints a ready-bet receipt with idea id, target, owner, run-now command, and check
outcome_review.expected: initialize should leave one obvious executable next step backed by repo truth
outcome_review.follow_up: keep the seed to one bet only unless multiple fork cycles prove the need

title: Surface one fork-first ready bet

effect: Initialize handoff becomes explicit and idempotent: generated README and CLI output both point at the seeded backlog and checks.
notes: Chief of Staff follow-on: make fork seed path explicit, not transcript-only.

outcome_review.actual: initialize docs and output now point operators at ideas ready/report and the seeded starter backlog
outcome_review.expected: initialize contract should advertise seeded targets and starter backlog instead of a vague next step
outcome_review.follow_up: if fork support questions recur, add one smoke test around generated README text before growing more ceremony

title: Tighten initialize handoff contract

effect: One best non-hygiene bet gets proposed from archived targets and reviewed outcomes so the queue refills from repo truth instead of transcript memory.
notes: CEO post-archive decision: refill queue from archived outcomes with one best next bet, not a broad brainstorm engine.

outcome_review.actual: ideas report now emits one synthesized next-bet candidate, falling back to learning-ledger when no strong unresolved follow-up remains
outcome_review.expected: archived outcomes should yield one best next non-hygiene bet from repo truth
outcome_review.follow_up: use the synthesized learning-ledger candidate as the next ready implementation bet

title: Synthesize next bet from archived outcomes

effect: Archived work emits one durable lesson tied to target, facet, source artifact, and check so future bet picks use repo evidence instead of transcript memory.
notes: Synthesized from archived outcomes after archive pass: turn reviewed work into one durable learning artifact for future priority selection.

outcome_review.actual: ideas sync_learning_ledger now writes a deterministic learning ledger table under .agents/kb_src/tables and ideas report surfaces ledger counts and sample lessons
outcome_review.expected: archived outcomes should emit one durable lesson row tied to target, facet, source artifact, and check
outcome_review.follow_up: use learning ledger rows as input to the next board pass before adding heavier execution packet machinery

title: Capture learning ledger from archived outcomes

effect: ideas report names one cited run-now next bet from learning-ledger truth and no longer loops back to already-landed work
notes: CEO post-learning-ledger decision: one cheap execution receipt from existing repo truth; fold stale self-loop guardrail into same slice.

outcome_review.actual: ideas report now prefers learning-ledger evidence for next-bet receipts, prints cited lesson/check/artifact context, and suppresses stale fallback once the ledger exists
outcome_review.expected: report should emit one evidence-backed next bet receipt from learning-ledger rows without nominating already-landed work
outcome_review.follow_up: if operators need direct filtering after repeated use, add a tiny learning-ledger query surface before any heavier execution packet machinery

title: Emit evidence-backed next bet receipt

effect: Queue refills from repo truth with one active target plus one startable slice backed by cited lesson, check, and write scope data.
notes: CEO post-archive decision: one bet only. Close receipt-to-execution gap without adding a second ledger or packet theater.

outcome_review.actual: ideas activate_next_bet now creates a new active target plus a startable idea, defaulting owner/check/write scope from the chosen lesson and stamping evidence into notes
outcome_review.expected: repo should mint one active target and shaped idea from learning-ledger evidence without manual dual-file editing
outcome_review.follow_up: if real operators need cheaper candidate selection, add a tiny lesson picker before growing any broader queue automation

title: Mint one active target and shaped idea from next-bet evidence

effect: ideas report and activate_next_bet refuse stale lesson bases, making repo-local evidence trustworthy again after target lifecycle changes.
notes: CEO post-activation decision: freshness/truth before picker/query/fork-pack expansion.

outcome_review.actual: ideas report now flags missing derived lessons with an explicit sync command, and activate_next_bet refuses stale evidence instead of activating from an out-of-date ledger
outcome_review.expected: report should surface stale lesson drift and activation should fail loud until ledger sync catches archived reviewed outcomes
outcome_review.follow_up: if lesson selection remains expensive after freshness is reliable, add a tiny lesson query surface before any ranking or fork-pack expansion

title: Fail loud on stale learning-ledger evidence

effect: Operators can list and filter durable lesson evidence by facet, target, check, and artifact before choosing the next bet.
notes: CEO post-freshness decision: one tiny read surface before picker/ranking/fork-pack expansion.

outcome_review.actual: ideas lessons now lists and filters synced learning-ledger rows, supports json output, and reuses freshness fail-loud before exposing stale evidence
outcome_review.expected: operators should be able to inspect durable lesson evidence directly from repo truth without grep or chat memory
outcome_review.follow_up: if query usage proves lesson choice still cumbersome, add a tiny picker for activate_next_bet before any scoring or broader automation

title: Add learning-ledger query surface

effect: Operators can activate one lesson from current query filters without hand-copying lesson ids or provenance fields.
notes: CEO post-query decision: one tiny picker, no ranking engine, no broader workflow layer.

outcome_review.actual: activate_next_bet now accepts facet/target/check-filter/artifact filters, picks one matching lesson when unique, and fails loud when filters are ambiguous while preserving freshness checks and existing exact-id path
outcome_review.expected: activate_next_bet should accept one filtered lesson match and fail loud on ambiguity instead of forcing transcript/manual lesson-id selection
outcome_review.follow_up: if repeated operator use shows provenance gaps, add tiny receipt hardening before any ranking or fork-lineage features

title: Add lesson picker to activate_next_bet
